chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4551 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of case 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 19.08.2025 Mr. Irshad Ali Bhatti, Advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Zahrah Sehr Vayani, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press this petition, the same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
